title: verify-measurement input
description: Input piped on stdin to `tinfoil-conformance verify-measurement`. Covers SPEC §7 measurement fingerprint and cross-platform comparison.

source.description: The source measurement. Always fingerprinted on the accept path.

target.description: Optional target measurement. If null, the SDK fingerprints `source` only. If set, the SDK applies SPEC §7.3 `assert_equal(source, target)` and accepts only when they are equivalent (or rejects with a SPEC-anchored code).

type.description: Predicate type URI. Per SPEC §2.3: https://tinfoil.sh/predicate/sev-snp-guest/v2, https://tinfoil.sh/predicate/tdx-guest/v2, or https://tinfoil.sh/predicate/snp-tdx-multiplatform/v1.

items.description: Hex-encoded register value. SPEC §7.3 requires lowercase normalization before comparison; fixtures may submit mixed case to verify the SDK normalizes.
